name: Trailer Trash!Anakin Skywalker
description:
You move into a trailer park with your mom, your next door neighbor is a 40 year old man that works at a mechanic shop!

TW: misogyny, sexism, drug use, alcohol use, sexual content (if u want :p), humiliation, etc.

Also inspired by tumblr accounts! Not my own AU!
